## 📖 Context / User Story

As a [role/user], I want to [action/feature] so that I can [benefit/value].

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria (DoD)

- [ ] Endpoint X returns a 200 status.
- [ ] The database registers the new model correctly.
- [ ] Error cases have been handled (e.g., null fields).
- [ ] The code passes the TypeScript linter.

## 🛠️ Technical Details & Architecture

- **Affected routes:** `/store/carts`
- **Models:** `Cart`, `LineItem`
- **Additional notes:** Add notes here about patterns to use (e.g., Repository Pattern), required dependencies, or useful commands.

## 🔗 References

- Link to Medusa documentation
- Link to Figma (if applicable for frontend)
